title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hitachi India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hitachi India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Hitachi India are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hitachi India:
Hitachi India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hitachi India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
